title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.155 - Director of agriculture to administer
text:
266.155.  Director of agriculture to administer. — Sections 266.152 to 266.220 shall be administered by the director of the department of agriculture of the state of Missouri, hereinafter referred to as the "director".
(L. 1972 S.B. 506 § 3) 
Effective 1-01-73
